---
title: "Week 7: Measuring and improving performance"
---

```{r}
week <- 7
source(here::here("course_info.R"))
```

## Main references

* [23-24. *Advanced R*](https://adv-r.hadley.nz/perf-measure.html)
* [Efficient R Programming](https://csgillespie.github.io/efficientR/)

## What you will learn this week

* Profiling code
* Measuring code performance
* Vectorisation
* Caching results

## Pre-class activities

* Watch [Advanced R Book Club: Measuring and Improving Performance](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pOaiDK7J7EE)


```{r}
#| output: asis
show_slides(week)
```

[Code used in workshop](week7/lab.R)

```{r}
#| output: asis
show_assignments(week)
```
